name: neuralpathtracer
title: Neural Path Tracer
description: A "God-Tier" Path Drawing Effect. Features: - Neural SVG Tracing: Follows and draws complex paths with high-end neon glows. - Canvas Spark Engine: High-performance particle simulation with gravity. - Abstract UI: Defaulted to a sophisticated synapse-like curve. - Spatial Audio: Synchronized sizzling/plasma feedback.
